summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FoodBridge new features: expanded donor org types, shelter capacity for receivers, meal preparation datetime, and matching logic. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI elements implemented and functional.
passed_tests: Backend: All 15 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Donor registration with expanded organization types (23+ options including Corporate Office, Wedding Hall, etc.)
Receiver registration with shelter_capacity field (validated with helper text)
Donation creation with meal_prepared_at datetime field (calendar picker working)
Receiver dashboard displays shelter capacity stat card (shows 100 people)
Backend matching logic working (partial/full match based on servings vs capacity)
API endpoints: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/donations, GET /api/donations, GET /api/metrics
Frontend navigation and form submissions working correctly
Data persistence and API integration functional

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor UI test coverage gap for match badges)
